title: v4.8.1 Navigation and UI Consistency Patch
notes: Each major journey phase now opens a clickable subpart menu
Required A2 and A3 pattern categories can no longer be deleted
Additional pattern, gap, and definition rows remain available
A3 gap fields stay inside a responsive editing card
Mobile screens keep the task count and All Tasks chooser visible so every field remains discoverable
Header save and active-time information is more compact
Version attribution is consistent across the app and generated outputs
